svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="凭证三层读取视图" id="credential"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-178" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="同一张凭证表,三个读取视图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="400" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="tenant_wechat_credential (底层物理表)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="430" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="AppSecret / 商户号 / API v3 密钥 / 证书
敏感字段全部 AES 加密" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="370" y="575" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="视图 1:C 端匿名" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="80" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v1_out" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="只返回布尔能力位
hasAppSecret: true
wechatJsapiPayEnabled: true
❌ 不返回 AppId / 商户号" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="80" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v1_who" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="消费方:小程序前端
用途:判断要不要亮起支付按钮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="260" x="60" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="视图 2:运营端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="440" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v2_out" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="返回脱敏标识符
appId: wx1234****abcd
merchantId: 16****88
❌ 不返回 secret 原文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="440" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v2_who" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="消费方:运营管理后台
用途:让运营认得出是哪个租户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="260" x="420" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="视图 3:内部服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="800" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v3_out" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="返回明文(仅限内网)
AppSecret / 证书 / API v3 密钥
用于真正调微信 OpenAPI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="800" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v3_who" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="消费方:微信集成层服务
用途:发起 commit / 提审 / 退款" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="260" x="780" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v1" edge="1" parent="1" source="v1_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="db" value="SELECT 布尔位"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v2" edge="1" parent="1" source="v2_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="db" value="SELECT 脱敏"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v3" edge="1" parent="1" source="v3_out" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="db" value="SELECT 解密"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="update_note" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;dashed=1;" value="入库规则:
• 密钥类字段 AES 加密后存
• 更新时传 null = 保留旧密文
• 脱敏值回传 → 不入库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="780" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
入库规则:
• 密钥类字段 AES 加密后存
• 更新时传 null = 保留旧密文
• 脱敏值回传 → 不入库
